column3: I changed my mind. You don't have to come with me today.
I want to think on my own. You'd have more fun talking with somebody else, wouldn't you?
Come to my hand. I'll take you back to the drawer.
Well, do what you want, but I'm fine on my own.

column1: # 冴子、無言で考え事してる。勉強はしてない。できれば悩んでる感じの初出し差分が欲しい

column3: No. I just told you I want to think about something.

column1: # 3〜4つ質問を自由に選べる。答えたあとは元の選択肢に戻り、全て聞いたら(skit

column3: What I like? ...Why are you asking?
Hm, I like looking at clothing. Seeing what's popular, and what isn't.
I used to wear formal dresses a lot for piano recitals.
I'd be reborn as a princess from another world just by putting on a long dress.
I haven't been to any recitals lately, so I haven't had many chances to wear them...
I still look at clothes sometimes and think about whether they'll look good on me.
Everyone says you should just wear what you want and ignore what other people think...
It's a mystery to me too... but I remember when it started.

column1: # 原案小説で、「冴子の父親がアフリカから呪術師の仮面を持って帰ってきた、それをきっかけに魔力が開花した」という設定があります。
# ただ、現代の感覚では若干ステレオタイプな感じがするので、ゲーム内のテキストとしては具体的な地域をボカしています

column3: My father brought back a mask from an overseas business trip.
He probably just meant it as a surprise for his young daughter.

column1: # 初潮、ただし低年齢すぎるので絶対にボカす

column3: But on the next full moon, I suddenly fell ill...
It's a mystery to me too. All of it.
Even if I don't know the backstory, all of it started with me.
I really enjoyed shrinking and eating people. I'm sad to say it, but it's true.
Why ask when you already know? You must have already realized that in your time with me.
I'm rather diligent, I think. I've never forgotten to do my homework.
I usually do what people ask me to perfectly, though I haven't had any chance to show you that...
And, hm... I like things to be harmonious.
Like with my room and Scriabin's melodies.
When everything I see is perfectly in order, with nothing out of line...
I love it when the world is like that.
Why are you asking me that now?
Bye, Rin. Let's meet again tomorrow.
You can't just ask anything you want because I'm feeling weak.
...I've never fallen in love with somebody like other girls.
Kissing, holding hands, and having my heart race over that... I've never felt that way.
If you put aside any ideas of romance...
...there is somebody I don't want to hate me.
Forget everything I said just now. Or else...
Bye, Rin. I'll see you tomorrow morning.
